headline: Did Citi’s New Debt Issuance And Digital Note Launch Just Shift Citigroup's (C) Investment Narrative?
summary: In recent days, Citigroup Inc. issued a series of new senior unsecured notes across fixed, floating, and zero-coupon structures, while also completing several medium-term note offerings and launching its first digitally native structured note on Euroclear’s DLT platform. At the same time, Citi outlined ambitions for a 10%–11% return on tangible common equity and mid-teens growth in investment banking and markets revenue, highlighting management’s focus on profitability and capital-light fee...
